message:
Did you know no two dogs have the same nose? 👃🐶 Just like our fingerprints, every dog's nose has a unique pattern of ridges and bumps — completely one of a kind. Some shelters and registries have even used nose prints to help reunite lost dogs with their families. So that little boop machine on your pup's face is truly one in a billion. 💙

Give your dog's nose a gentle boop from us and comment 🐾!
